input.memoryNote: You texted me a live play-by-play of your entire first date from the bathroom. Seven bathroom trips in 90 minutes. I have the full transcript saved. It was the greatest piece of real-time disaster journalism I have ever received.

meta.tiktokHook: My best friend texted me through her entire first date from the bathroom. 7 trips in 90 minutes. I have the full transcript. It reads like a nature documentary.
